data.title: Iridium NTN Direct beta trials ongoing, first message sent. Iridium (IRDM) leading global satellite provider.
data.description: On January 21, 2026, Iridium Communications Inc. (Nasdaq: IRDM) based in McLean, Virginia, revealed that the inaugural message sent via the Iridium NTN Direct service from a mobile device featured the phrase "To Iridium and Beyond." The company specializes in offering global satellite services for voice, data, and PNT. This development marks a significant milestone for Iridium as it showcases the capabilities of their service.

data.title: Southwest Florida commercial real estate market transitions from aggressive growth to realism in 2026.
data.description: In Fort Myers, Florida as of January 21, 2026, commercial real estate investors in Southwest Florida are transitioning to a new approach after a period of robust expansion and risky underwriting. The focus is shifting from speculation to a more cautious outlook as the market dynamics evolve.

data.title: Heather Ripley to speak at AHR EXPO 2026 about boosting awareness. Global PR agency Ripley PR specializes in skilled trades.
data.description: A renowned public relations specialist in the skilled trades sector will be conducting a seminar on effective strategies to enhance recognition and presence in the industry. This event is scheduled to take place in Knoxville, Tennessee on January 21, 2026. Ripley PR, a prominent global PR firm focusing on skilled trades and B2B technology, will be spearheading this session aimed at sharing insights and best practices for increasing visibility.

data.title: Wayfair to announce Q4 2025 results on Feb 19, 2026, post market opening. Inc (NYSE:W) updates investors.
data.description: Boston-based Wayfair Inc. (NYSE:W) revealed plans to unveil its financial performance for the fourth quarter ending on December 31, 2025, ahead of the market opening on February 19, 2026. The company, known for being a one-stop-shop for all home-related products, will conduct a conference call following the release to discuss the results.

data.title: Biotech expert Teresa Foy joins T1D Fund to advance Type 1 Diabetes therapies, enhancing impact strategy with innovative investments.
data.description: A former executive at Bristol Myers Squibb and Celgene is set to enhance the impact strategy of The T1D Fund, a venture capital fund dedicated to Type 1 Diabetes research. The individual will help drive transformative investments in innovative approaches. This announcement was made in Boston on January 21, 2026. The T1D Fund aims to make significant investments in breakthrough therapies for Type 1 Diabetes.

data.title: Okeanis Eco Tankers Corp. completes offering of 3.6 million shares at USD 36 each, raises $130 million.
data.description: In Athens, Greece on January 21, 2026, Okeanis Eco Tankers Corp. (NYSE: ECO, OSE: OET) completed the pricing of 3,611,111 new shares of its common stock at USD 36.00 per share, generating around USD 130 million in gross proceeds. The offering, comprising shares with a par value of USD 0.001 each, was a success for the company.

data.title: Halliburton reports Q4 2025 net income of $589M ($0.70/share) compared to $18M ($0.02/share) in Q3 2025, showing significant growth.
data.description: Halliburton Company reported a net income of $589 million, or $0.70 per diluted share, for the fourth quarter of 2025. The adjusted net income, excluding "Impairments and other charges" and tax adjustments, stood at $576 million, or $0.69 per diluted share. This marks a significant increase compared to the third quarter of 2025, where the net income was $18 million, or $0.02 per diluted share, and the adjusted net income was $496 million. The strong performance in the fourth quarter showcases a substantial improvement in profitability for Halliburton Company.

data.title: Northisle shares corporate and exploration update, with focus on 2026 execution plan after 2025 activities review.
data.description: In British Columbia, Northisle has announced its latest updates regarding activities in 2025 and projections for 2026. The company is pleased to share its plans moving forward.

data.title: BioTown Biogas appoints Christopher J. Pino as CEO; specializes in converting livestock waste to renewable energy. Pino brings 15 years of experience from South Jersey Industries.
data.description: In Reynolds, Indiana, BioTown Biogas revealed the appointment of Christopher J. Pino as their new Chief Executive Officer. BioTown is known for its work in converting livestock waste into renewable natural gas and electric power, contributing to carbon negativity. Pino, who previously spent close to 15 years at South Jersey Industries (SJI), an energy infrastructure company in Folsom, NJ, will lead BioTown in collaboration with Green Rock Energy Partners. This move marks a strategic shift for the company as they aim to further their endeavors in the renewable energy sector.

data.title: Vista Gold to present at Metals Investor Forum 2026 in January. CEO to join John Kaiser for conference session.
data.description: Vista Gold Corp. (NYSE American and TSX: VGZ) will be participating in the Metals Investor Forum 2026 scheduled for January 23-24, 2026, at the Fairmont Pacific Rim Hotel in Vancouver, British Columbia. Frederick H. Earnest, President and CEO of Vista, will be alongside John Kaiser from Kaiser Research Online during Session 5, starting at 4:40 p.m. PST on Friday, January 23. Mr. Earnest will present to investors on the same day.

data.title: Dime Community Bancshares, Inc. has strong Q4 results with 15% EPS increase on linked quarter basis.
data.description: Dime Community Bancshares, Inc. has announced robust results for the fourth quarter, showing a 15% increase in earnings per share compared to the previous quarter. The positive growth demonstrates the company's strong performance and financial resilience. The specific numbers related to this increase were not provided, but it indicates significant progress in the company's financial performance.
